center.name: 邦盖县
center.summary: 邦盖县是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括Sulawesi hawk-eagle、Ashy woodpecker，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: fulvus, which is found in northern Sulawesi, the islands of Lembeh and Manterawu, and the archipelagos of Togian and Banggai; and M

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: An Indonesian endemic, the Sulawesi hawk-eagle is distributed in rainforests of Sulawesi and its satellite islands of Buton, Muna, Banggai and Sula Islands
